programme.title: E5 - Sikou Niakate (Mali)
programme.desc: After growing up in a squat near Paris and then in a working-class neighborhood in the 19th arrondissement, Sikou became an author and director. His work explores the fractures of identity, social class, gender and racism. Through cinema and writing, he gives a voice to those condemned to silence.

programme.desc: Dora and Boots help the Grumples make troll jelly before the Grumpy Old Troll's snack time. / Dora and Boots have to recover El Gatito Magico and put it in its special place so all the friends stop acting like a cat.

programme.title: E124 - Barbazoo Can't Say ''no'' / The Doppelganger
programme.desc: Barbazoo is ready to help. But Barbabright and Barbabelle abuse his kindness and drive him crazy. // By chance, Barbazoo realizes he can imitate Barbapapa. He uses this opportunity to distribute chores to his brothers and sisters. Will they find out?

programme.title: E101 - The Crew Builds A Bridge
programme.desc: Rubble and his construction pup family gear up to build a bridge, only to find the villainous Speed Meister has a different idea. It's up to Rubble & Crew to work together and save the day by building a new, safe bridge to Builder Cove.

programme.title: E513 - The Flying Vet
programme.desc: Doctor Hamster is rushed off her feet when nearly all the animals need her help on the same day.

programme.title: E515 - Captain Daddy Dog
programme.desc: Mummy Dog and Danny are very excited! Captain Daddy Dog is home from the sea, and he's bearing gifts! What can they be?

programme.title: E505 - Naughty Tortoise
programme.desc: Dr Hamster's pet tortoise Tiddles gets stuck up a tree - who is going to come to the rescue?

programme.title: E124 - Barbazoo Can't Say ''no'' / The Doppelganger
programme.desc: Barbazoo is ready to help. But Barbabright and Barbabelle abuse his kindness and drive him crazy. // By chance, Barbazoo realizes he can imitate Barbapapa. He uses this opportunity to distribute chores to his brothers and sisters. Will they find out?

programme.title: E206 - Partly Claudia / Ranita's Magic Stripes
programme.desc: Dora and Boots take Claudia, an energetic young rain cloud, to rain on a dry water slide. / Boots gets a case of Tickle Tail that Ranita the Frog can cure if she gets her magic stripes by helping friends around the Rainforest.

programme.title: E222 - I'm Not A Barbababy Anymore / Roboxman
programme.desc: No! It's over! Barbidur is no longer a baby, he's a big boy now! // The barbababies are going to the hypermarket for the first time.

programme.title: E326 - Pups Save Floating Friends / Pups Save A Satellite

programme.desc: It's more Blaze family fun in this high octane, action-packed adventure as Blaze and his sister Sparkle team up to make it back to the Monster Dome in time for a big race.

programme.title: E113 - The Perfect Dinner / The Kittens

programme.desc: Kai's Dojobot for training the Deer Squad is stolen by Baron Bite who turns it against them! // Lady Fluffpot spots a sea Monster whilst swimming at the beach!

programme.desc: Richard Rabbit comes to play with George, and Suzy Sheep comes to play with Peppa! The boys and girls don't want to play the same games, but they all like jumping up and down in muddy puddles.

Gorilla Foot
programme.desc: Ubongo, the gorilla, has a massive cut on his foot. But how do you treat a 400-pound gorilla with a sore foot? And have you ever seen a sloth take a shower? Hugo, the sloth, will draw back the shower curtain and reveal all.

programme.title: Plastic Cups
programme.desc: What could we make with a paper cup? Let's find out.

programme.title: Mundi's Day Off
programme.desc: How could we have superpowers? The team flies off to Germany, to borrow some high-tech ‘super' suits. They try using a climbing suit, a jet pack and a powerlifting suit, but none is able to recover the Frisbee.

programme.title: Treasure Story
programme.desc: While searching for treasure on the beach, Smorph imagines the story of how a brave submarine used a light-up shield to scare off a sub eating shark!

programme.title: Pinecone
programme.desc: Creativity has no limits! Watch Hepi and Briko transform these cones into something lovely.

programme.title: The Spring
programme.desc: The well in the woods needs cleaning and protection from an unknown vandal.

programme.title: Pittsburgh
programme.desc: Pittsburgh adventure: Battled rapids on a white water adventure, savored Primanti Brothers' iconic taste, hands-on bird experience at National Aviary, and glided across the sky with the Pittsburgh soaring club. A week of diverse thrills in Pennsylvania!

programme.title: The Spring
programme.desc: The well in the woods needs cleaning and protection from an unknown vandal.

programme.title: The Day Henry Met...a Taxi
programme.desc: Today Henry meets a New York Taxi Cab, and he becomes a Cab Driver and drives a customer to the Statue of Liberty just in time for sunset.

programme.title: Critical Examination
programme.desc: Robyn and Nyatepe help transfer a sick lion into a mobile high-tech scanner unit for a critical examination. Josh and Molly are checking the competitors in a posh horse trial for signs of injury and illness. And Jamie and Bonte are helping with Leo's leg surgery.

programme.title: Song of the Siren
programme.desc: Devil Daniels thinks he is hunting a mythical creature whose song lures sailors to their doom. The Nektons discover it's a rare whale.

programme.title: Dolphin
programme.desc: Today Kristina has to perform an ultrasound on Ulysses, the dolphin's, eye. But can she train Ulysses to keep her eye open long enough to perform the vital test? Meet also Garoe, a one-year-old chimp and Dali, the emperor tamarin, who has an age-old problem.

programme.title: Day of the Dragon
programme.desc: Ricky orders a takeaway, but will his fortune cookies' predictions come true? After making a dragon bike basket and using a pizza box as a canvas, Gavin arrives with a map to the Great Wall of Bristol to animate a monster of a picture.

programme.title: De Hoop - Place Of Hope
programme.desc: The explorers search a colony of rare and endangered vultures that live high in the secluded mountains of the Western Cape. They come upon a refuge for animals, where unexpectedly they catch a glimpse of the largest mammal on the planet.

programme.title: Invisiboy!
programme.desc: Bored, Robbie visits Motor and secretly takes his invisibility helmet. Now invisible, he pranks everyone! But soon he realizes being unseen isn't so fun after all. The helmet's locked, and he needs help-how do you take off something no one can see... or reach?

programme.title: Treasure Story
programme.desc: While searching for treasure on the beach, Smorph imagines the story of how a brave submarine used a light-up shield to scare off a sub eating shark!

programme.title: Pinecone
programme.desc: Creativity has no limits! Watch Hepi and Briko transform these cones into something lovely.

programme.title: Abraca-Doki
programme.desc: When amateur magician Doki accidentally makes Gabi's worm vanish, Gabi is in a panic. How can they bring Lancelot back? To find out, Team Doki travels to a magic show in Las Vegas, Nevada to ask for help from a real magician named The Fantabulous Fenn.

programme.title: Mystery of the Halloween Haunting
programme.desc: Addison and Tess make a haunted maze for Halloween, but things take a perplexing turn when it seems that there really is a spooky presence on the loose within it – scaring away all their customers!

programme.title: Mapping and Levels
programme.desc: How come we see the Earth as flat when we know it's round? A puzzling question lands you in the wondrous world of geography. Have hands-on fun by making a carpenter's level, and get to know Kim Jeong-ho, a cartographer who created the first detailed map of Korea.

programme.title: Doughnut
programme.desc: Telmo and Tula teach kids how to make delicious doughnuts, featuring steps like mixing dough and adding toppings,

programme.title: Dolphin

programme.title: Hawaii
programme.desc: Hawaii island-hopping: Lava exploration on the Big Island by land and sea with local teens, muddy ATV ride in Kauai, and cultural insights at a lively luau. A week of thrilling adventures and Hawaiian traditions!

programme.title: The Proteus Factor
programme.desc: Proteus traps the Aronnax in a magnetic field and kidnaps Ant, believing he is the key to finding Lemuria.

programme.title: Mind Mess
programme.desc: Something's wrong-Motor is meowing! Carol and Robbie find he's swapped brains with a cat in a lab experiment gone right... but now he can't switch back! As they try to fix it, chaos erupts: Robbie ends up in Carol's body, Carol in Robbie's, and Motor's still a cat!

programme.title: Monster Grow
programme.desc: Due to a new fertilizer,Teresa grows till she can't fit in the house, Max and Team Alien believe it's a plot to grow enormous and stomp the town flat - despite Goliath's desperate pleas that they help him figure out what's wrong with her.

Un regard global et complet sur l'actualité pour mieux comprendre les événements qui façonnent notre époque.

programme.title: C'est en France
programme.desc: Un regard approfondi sur l'actualité en France : société, politique et culture. À travers des reportages et des interviews, nous explorons les enjeux du quotidien pour mieux comprendre la réalité vécue par les Français aujourd'hui.

programme.title: L'instant mobile
programme.desc: Une émission d'information au format court qui traite des sujets les plus captivants venus du monde entier. À travers des reportages dynamiques et un regard incisif, elle propose un condensé de l'actualité internationale pour rester informé rapidement et efficacement.

programme.title: Au coeur de l'info : le journal[Live]

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: Meet the mob of ‘street smart’ kangaroos moving into Australia’s capital city and the ecologists following their every move. Over one year we follow mob leader Black Spot and kangaroo mum Madge with her two young joeys – mischievous Sonny and tiny pouch bound Alice. After 15 years of drought, Canberra’s Eastern Grey Kangaroos know that the parks and gardens of Australia’s “bush capital” provide a reliable supply of the juicy grass but learning to be a street-smart urban ‘roo is tough with the kangaroos negotiating busy roads and avoiding cars and dogs. Inevitably their incursion into human habitat causes problems – damage to property and collisions with cars. It’s costing millions and thousands of animals are killed each year. The farmers complain that the ‘roos are eroding farmland and damaging their fences. The ACT Government holds an annual kangaroo cull to reduce animal numbers to “sustainable levels”. Confrontations make international news as the situation arouses passions and pol

programme.title: TV Theatre
programme.desc: Excellent TV Series

programme.title: Trailblazing
programme.desc: The feature program 'Trailblazing' on Shenzhen TV fully illustrates Shenzhen's trailblazing exploration and demonstration role as a pilot demonstration zone for socialism with Chinese characteristics. Through the micro recording approach and small entry points in character stories, the program showcases stories of trailblazing exploration and pioneering efforts in Shenzhen, reflecting the major theme of China's high-quality development.

programme.title: Innovation In Sync, Pioneering The Front!
programme.desc: Innovation in Sync, Pioneering the Front! 'The Frontiers' is your direct link to innovation, powered by the Shenzhen Media Group's AI Lab and China's largest AI models. Get the lowdown on groundbreaking trends-it's all here, served fresh and hot. With our forward-thinking geniuses, every episode is a thrilling journey into the future that's closer than you might think! This program will start in May 27th, tune in every night at 21:20 for a riveting 15-minute exploration.

programme.title: Zhi Financial News
programme.desc: Zhi Financial News is a daily news program on Shenzhen TV. The 10-minute show covers global financial headlines and offers authoritative insights into the latest economic trends.

Through the micro recording approach and small entry points in character stories, the program showcases stories of trailblazing exploration and pioneering efforts in Shenzhen, reflecting the major theme of China's high-quality development.

programme.title: Talk With Claire About Great Bay Area
programme.desc: “Talk With Claire About Great Bay Area” is a bilingual interview program on Shenzhen TV that focuses on in-depth exploration and research. With a global perspective on the Guangdong-Hong Kong-Macao Greater Bay Area, it captures cutting-edge trends in economic and trade exchanges, technological innovation, cultural trends, and more between China and the world. Through on-site research and interviews, the program engages in conversations with leaders from government, business, technology, and cultural sectors. It showcases technological achievements, trends in economic and trade exchanges, and mutual learning in civilization exchanges. Since its inception over two years ago, “Talk With Claire About Great Bay Area” has aired more than a hundred episodes of specialized interviews. The program integrates prominent international figures into the Greater Bay Area, where guests draw from their personal experiences living and working in the area or provide professional perspectives o

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE delivers the latest from Japan, Asia, and the rest of the world. While covering wide network of correspondents breaking news and developing stories, offering a perspective from this corner of the globe, a team of trusted anchors ties it all together to give you a picture of what's happening now, and what's ahead.

programme.title: E205 - iStage An Intervention
programme.desc: Carly needs to intervene when Spencer becomes addicted to playing a video game. Sam tricks Freddie into believing that he’s being plagued by bad luck when he refuses to forward a 'chain email'.

programme.title: E110 - Donnie Goes Deep
programme.desc: Donnie and Wingnut go to restore power to the Lair but get trapped by the East River 3! The water is rising and they're not alone... there's a monster down there with them!

programme.title: E116 - In the Sky / Best Buddies
programme.desc: When Diamondo refuses to give the twins a ride in his spaceship they embark on some space exploration of their own. // Best becomes entangled in a series of awkward situations when he pretends to know someone he's never met before.

programme.title: E806 - Europe Road Trip: Nonna Your Business / Europe Road Trip: Alpining Away
programme.desc: The Louds journey to Naples Italy to taste the world's best pizza, made by a secretive and legendary chef. // When Lynn crushes on a boy in the Swiss Alps, Lori and Leni become her crush coaches to help her talk to him.

programme.title: E202 - Emergency Family Tribunal
programme.desc: When the last hallasand goes missing, fingers point to Halmoni and only a family tribunal will set the record straight.

programme.title: E225 - Cuddle E. Hugs / Pat the Horse
programme.desc: SpongeBob's new friend is a giant fluffy hamster. There's one problem, though: no one else can see him! // Patrick wants to be a horse!

programme.title: E110 - The Meatball of Canyon Valley / Sticky Fingers
programme.desc: When Halmoni chooses Jack over Lil to be her Trot dance competition partner, jealous Lil seeks revenge. / Min asks Jack to run a simple errand, but Charlie the gibbon intervenes, sending Jack and Lil chasing after him into the town's abandoned mines.

programme.title: E806 - Europe Road Trip: Nonna Your Business / Europe Road Trip: Alpining Away
programme.desc: The Louds journey to Naples Italy to taste the world's best pizza, made by a secretive and legendary chef. // When Lynn crushes on a boy in the Swiss Alps, Lori and Leni become her crush coaches to help her talk to him.

programme.title: E319 - Making Waves / Captain Quasar: The Next Iteration
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs and Plankton are forced to spend time together when they accidentally book the same room on a cruise. // SpongeBob and Bubble Bass butt heads over which version of Quasar is better.

programme.title: E119 - Fight or Flight / Employee of the Month
programme.desc: Best and Bester have to find a smart way to make their flight despite not looking like their passport photos. // Best decides to let his sister win 'Employee of the Month' for once, but finds that losing doesn't come naturally.

programme.title: E118 - The Patterfly Effect / A Space Affair to Remember
programme.desc: Patrick messes with the space-time continuum. // While Cecil and Bunny celebrate their anniversary in outer space, Patrick and Squidina throw a house party.

programme.title: E308 - Dumber Force
programme.desc: In an effort to hinder Danger Force's performance, The Cell manipulates Jeff and Mitch Bilsky into buying Swellview Jr. High. When Mika, Miles, and Chapa become too dimwitted to fight crime, it's up to Bose to save his friends from 'Mitch School.'

programme.title: E703 - Candy Crushed
programme.desc: Lola struggles to dampen her sweet tooth when mom challenges her to go an entire week without sugar.

programme.title: E222 - Krabby Patty Creature Feature / Teacher's Pests
programme.desc: A new secret Krabby Patty formula has disastrous results for Bikini Bottom, and only SpongeBob can save the day. // Mr. Krabs and Plankton have to take boating school classes. Thankfully, SpongeBob's there to show them the ropes!

programme.title: E906 - Rough Patch / The GLOAT
programme.desc: To earn her next patch and become a golden Snickerdoodle, Lola must spend quality time with Sunset Canyon senior, Bernie. // After Lynn sees cousin Shiloh's athletic skills, she gets overly competitive to prove she's the greatest Loud of all time.

programme.title: E609 - The Last Laugh / Driver's Dread
programme.desc: Luan thinks Mr. Coconuts is out for revenge when she replaces him with Lola in her act. // Hoping to drive out to the outlets to meet Lori, Leni ooks for alternative ways to get her driver's license.

programme.title: E412 - Visiting Vikings / It's Too Late...With Plankton
programme.desc: For Leif Erikson Day, Patrick and SpongeBob time-travel back to Viking times. // When the Stars go to the mountains, Squidina hires Plankton to entertain the Lawnies.

programme.title: E102 - Sad, Single, and Stranded / A Waste of a Perfect Summer Day
programme.desc: Will & Min show Jack around to help him find a good story. Lily spills boba in Jack's suitcase and tries to hide the evidence. // Jack tries to find 'the big picture' as Lily shows him how to spend a perfect summer day in Canyon Valley.

programme.title: E714 - Bye Tanya / What Lies Beneath
programme.desc: Leni must protect her mannequin friend Tanya when her boss, Ms. Carmichael, decides to update Reininger's. // When Dante buries a secret in The Royal Woods Cemetery, he must stop the Morticians Club from discovering what it is.

programme.desc: SpongeBob's new friend is a giant fluffy hamster. There's one problem, though: no one else can see him! // Patrick wants to be a horse!

programme.title: E11 - Sonny's Second Chance
programme.desc: Sonny returns to Sodor to try to be a really useful engine again but some of the other trains aren't willing to give him a second chance.

programme.title: E13 - Pass The Parcel
programme.desc: Lucky's Dad is outraged that modern Pass the Parcel has a present in every layer and changes the rules back to only having one prize in the middle, but Bingo is forever losing.

programme.title: E108 - Bunny Rabbits
programme.desc: Tinky Winky, Dipsy, Laa-Laa and Po watch bunny rabbits. Bunny ears and tails appear on the Teletubbies. They do the 'bunny hop hop' before saying 'eh oh' to the Tiddlytubbies.

programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo make mud pizzas and deliver them to the grown-ups, but their pedal car's wheel keeps falling off.

programme.desc: When a heavy summer rain thunders over the Heeler home, Bluey is determined to dam the water in the front yard, while Mum tries to stop her constantly tracking mud into the house.

programme.desc: Have you ever wondered what goes on at the Squirrel Club when the sun goes down?

programme.desc: King Tiger has met his perfect partner and he is getting married. It's going to be a royal wedding!! The squirrels are to be special Guests of Honour, but who is King Tiger marrying!?

programme.title: E6
programme.desc: Age is just a number-attraction is pure instinct. Charismatic “Noonas” (older women) who have long put love on hold to pursue their careers meet younger men who fearlessly follow their hearts, sparking emotionally driven romances. Breaking through the real-world barriers of age differences, this bold and candid reality series follows older-woman–younger-man couples as they explore love with honesty and courage. As their relationships unfold, long-dormant romantic instincts are awakened in this refreshingly daring dating reality show.

programme.title: E34
programme.desc: A chaotic, high-stakes family saga where a seemingly perfect man and an endearingly flawed woman collide while every generation fights to become the main character of their own life.

programme.title: E4
programme.desc: The thoroughly city-bred Seong Taehun family suddenly finds themselves in the pristine yet unpredictable village of Yeonri-ri. Determined to return to Seoul, they face hilarious challenges, cultural clashes, and heartwarming moments. This family “reboot” drama captures their misadventures, resilience, and the unexpected bonds they form along the way.

programme.title: E223
programme.desc: MY HONG KONG STORY: Each episode of My Hong Kong Story features a Hong Kong native, or those who surround their tale here. Interviewees convey their indigenized story in a personnel aspect. With a 15-minute essence per episode, the cinematic language brings a new perspective to observe Hong Kong for Chinese-speaking audience around the world. Everyone can have an indepth understanding of Hong Kong and its people.

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: 一位正直的明星律師兼忠實粉絲，在偶像被指控謀殺後挺身而出，為他辯護。「孟世娜」是擁有豐富經歷的刑事辯護律師，同時是偶像團體Gold Boys的十年以上的忠實粉絲。在Gold Boys的主唱「都來益」因捲入殺人事件而成為嫌疑人時，她隱藏了自己的崇拜之情，為他辯護，並揭示了一個意想不到的真相。

programme.title: E1

programme.title: E6
programme.desc: 無論過去、現在、未來，每個別具意義的相遇都造就華麗的日子，且無論什麼人都曾經擁有過華麗的日子。事業、愛情兩得意的能力者李志赫遇上責任感強陽光開朗的咖啡廳經理兼室內設計師池恩悟。兩人儘管外表看似光鮮亮麗，但在經歷人生的低潮後仍守在對方身邊，克服各種試驗，找到人生的真諦。

programme.title: E13
programme.desc: 當紅主播許妍（趙露思飾）和都會精英沈皓明（陳偉霆飾）是一對人人艷羨慕的夫妻，看似十分般配的兩人，由於出生環境的差異，始終難以融入對方的圈子。許妍靠著光鮮的主持人身分和「精心裝點」的身世順利和沈皓明步入婚姻，而這一切盡在沈皓明的掌握下。衝突來臨，許妍脫離沈皓明的掌控一去不回頭。沈皓明卻發現自己早已陷入愛情，想要全力追回許妍。經歷種種，兩人終於撕掉外表的偽裝，重新靠近，會見彼此的內在，也重新認識自己。

programme.title: Brief Encounter In Shinjuku
programme.desc: Foon, a Public Relations manager, starts a happy life with his wife Ann after remarrying her. Kwan, a new public relation officer in Foon's department, falls in love with Foon after he shields her from being criticized, when there is friction between Foon and Ann. Thus Foon falls in love with Kwan gradually. After a business trip to Tokyo, their relationship becomes much closer, while Ann meets Chu, a councilor, who falls in love with her but can't get Ann's response. When returning to Hong Kong, Kwan doesn't want to destroy Foon's family and decides to marry her fianc? When Foon is depressed by this, Ann finds out the truth. Another rupture breaks out again.

programme.title: Happy Ghost IV
programme.desc: Hong Sum Kwai is enjoying a second life in metropolis Hong Kong. His girlfriend, Annie, is oblivious to the fact that her former incarnation was the village girl who perished the General to eternal suffering. Hong Sum Kwai teaches at the school where Annie's father serves as the principal. There are four sprightly yet mischievous male students in Hong Sum Kwai's charge, but they are duped by the girls and left stranded in the wilderness discovering the dead body of the General...

programme.title: The Movie Star Says -Manfred Wong (Part2)
programme.desc: Since veteran filmmaker Manfred Wong joined the film industry since 1970s and worked for numerous Hong Kong companies at the position from scriptwriter, Head of Promotions to film producer, he has now been the best guide bringing us to travel through a sense of nostalgia for the old days of Hong Kong cinema. In this programme, he tells refinedly that there was a strife between Cantonese and Mandarin movies in 50s and 60s while fierce competitions amongst different film production companies over decades; also how various film companies manifested in the 90s golden era of Hong Kong movies.

programme.title: Gimme, Gimme
programme.desc: Lobo and Skid are very close friends. They study in the same class, and they both grow up without their mothers. The two buddies often play in a band and play skateboards with their classmates. Soda, one of their classmates, has many girlfriends concurrently, and Suki is his closet girlfriend. Fion is another classmate. She is addicted to chat in phone with friends and strangers every day. She always thinks she will find a true love from playing line. One day, she has an argument with her boyfriend on street, and Pat, an innocent girl, saw the incident...

programme.desc: The internet is being flooded with AI-generated garbage. Disinformation, propaganda, a flood of synthetic images and sounds. Will we soon only be getting information that AI feeds us?

programme.title: Kiruna - A City Relocates
programme.desc: A church that 'migrates” to a new location kilometers away. A key event in the relocation of the northern Swedish city of Kiruna. As iron ore mining encroaches on its territory, large parts of the city are being forced to make way.

programme.title: House Of Lies
programme.desc: House of Lies is an intense, family-centered drama about two mothers who face off against each other. Shaped by painful pasts, they clash in a fierce battle marked by betrayal, hidden family secrets, and a fight for survival.

programme.title: House Of Lies
programme.desc: House of Lies is an intense, family-centered drama about two mothers who face off against each other. Shaped by painful pasts, they clash in a fierce battle marked by betrayal, hidden family secrets, and a fight for survival.

programme.title: Never Say Die
programme.desc: Never Say Die follows Joey Delgado (Jillian Ward), a principled IT student who runs a vlog spotlighting the quiet heroism of honest police officers-inspired by her father, Major Julio Delgado (Raymart Santiago). Her views are challenged when a viral expose by Andrew Dizon (David Licauco), a sharp and cynical investigative vlogger, paints her father as corrupt and gets him suspended. The expose shatters the home she so carefully nurtured and blames Andrew.

programme.title: Master Cutter
programme.desc: Follows a former scout ranger-turned-tailor who discovers his biological daughter is tied to a criminal syndicate.

programme.title: Family Feud
programme.desc: It features two families who compete to name the most popular answers to survey questions in order to win cash and prizes

Her views are challenged when a viral expose by Andrew Dizon (David Licauco), a sharp and cynical investigative vlogger, paints her father as corrupt and gets him suspended. The expose shatters the home she so carefully nurtured and blames Andrew.

programme.title: House Of Lies
programme.desc: House of Lies is an intense, family-centered drama about two mothers who face off against each other. Shaped by painful pasts, they clash in a fierce battle marked by betrayal, hidden family secrets, and a fight for survival.

programme.title: Linlang
programme.desc: Victor Lualhati, a former boxer turned seaman, discovers signs of his wife Juliana's infidelity and begins a personal investigation. As he digs deeper, Victor uncovers a web of deception involving powerful figures and family secrets, realizing that the affair is only part of a much larger and more dangerous conspiracy.

programme.title: Blood Vs. Duty[Live]
programme.desc: Two brothers separated in a maritime tragedy grow up on opposite sides of the law - one a dedicated Intelligence Officer, the other fiercely protective of the Tausug family that raised him. programme.title: E21 - Big Ball
programme.desc: When the gang caters an important sporting event, Mung and Truffles are at odds.

programme.title: E16 - Free Philly
programme.desc: When Philly Phil starts feeling like an outcast at Westley because of his poor performance in a Field Day event he transfers to a science magnet school. Missing their friend and feeling guilty for their role in making him feel unwanted the Westley kids have their work cut out for him when they try to woo him back. Meanwhile Luna is tired of being constantly upstaged by Sunny and vows to make the school think he's just as cool.

programme.title: E24 - Bounty Ball
programme.desc: While Gwen listens to a lecture on the Transcontinental Railroad, Ben sneaks away to the gift shop. When the Bounty Hunters appear and corner Ben, Gwen must use what she learnt to help him escape.

programme.title: E16 - Free Philly
programme.desc: When Philly Phil starts feeling like an outcast at Westley because of his poor performance in a Field Day event he transfers to a science magnet school. Missing their friend and feeling guilty for their role in making him feel unwanted the Westley kids have their work cut out for him when they try to woo him back. Meanwhile Luna is tired of being constantly upstaged by Sunny and vows to make the school think he's just as cool.

E13 - Pub Cheese Burger
programme.desc: Rachael takes traditional beefburgers to the next level by adding homemade pub-cheese topping, sauteed sweet onions, jalapeno peppers and bacon on a pretzel bun, sealed with lettuce.

programme.title: E6 - Hello, London!
programme.desc: Theresa is a nervous wreck trying to figure out what to pack for her first visit to the UK. Before departing she sages Victoria's house and brings a pre-housewarming gift to encourage her to move out.

programme.title: E7 - Pool House Clusterflip
programme.desc: James and his team take on a massive seven-bedroom zombie home with a terrible layout and a huge, rotting pool house in the backyard. Partner Andy has brought the project to James, hoping for a big payday.

programme.title: E6 - Hello, London!
programme.desc: Theresa is a nervous wreck trying to figure out what to pack for her first visit to the UK. Before departing she sages Victoria's house and brings a pre-housewarming gift to encourage her to move out.

programme.title: E7 - 極挑兄弟被「電擊」嚇出搞笑表情包
programme.desc: 「極挑團」原班人馬將與新成員一起解鎖更多挑戰，他們將與廣大觀眾一起跨越大江南北，體驗國民生活百態，用真心探訪這片古老土地上正在發生的溫情故事，以更豐富的視角觸摸這卷山河下每一位個體的對美好生活的深切期望。

programme.title: E10 - 收官大戲！皇后「強吻」眉姐姐斕曦
programme.desc: 蔡少芬、陶昕然、斕曦、張曉龍、藍盈瑩、陳思斯、楊九郎時隔13年後首次合體重聚，以全新的面貌組成「煥新團」，從承載無數記憶的《甄嬛傳》拍攝地北京大觀園出發，自北向南，由東向西，前往全國多個寶藏民族文化發源地，通過深度探訪、遊學，體驗各地民俗文化和風土人情，帶著回憶和新的憧憬環遊全國以完成“煥新之旅”。

programme.title: E10 - 收官大戲！皇后「強吻」眉姐姐斕曦
programme.desc: 蔡少芬、陶昕然、斕曦、張曉龍、藍盈瑩、陳思斯、楊九郎時隔13年後首次合體重聚，以全新的面貌組成「煥新團」，從承載無數記憶的《甄嬛傳》拍攝地北京大觀園出發，自北向南，由東向西，前往全國多個寶藏民族文化發源地，通過深度探訪、遊學，體驗各地民俗文化和風土人情，帶著回憶和新的憧憬環遊全國以完成“煥新之旅”。

programme.title: E11 - 征服百米雪坡 詮釋熱血團魂
programme.desc: 重磅打造的全明星爆笑旅行遊戲真人秀，由黃曉明、黃子韜、劉耀文、邵子恆、王鶴棣、于洋組成「宇宙爆閃團」，用高能抽象任務，打造解壓式快樂體驗，去有趣的地方做有意義的事；放下偶像包袱，發送獨一無二的快樂訊號。

programme.title: E1 - Creative Farm Adventures!
programme.desc: Get ready for some creative farm adventures with Ella! First, Ella brings school to Lellobee City Farm by creating a classroom in the Boogie Barn & teaching all her animal friends. Then, she helps Mei make some delicious jam using fresh strawberries, grapes & blueberries from the farm! The creative day ends with a magical night of stargazing, where Mei points out constellations that look just like the animals on the farm.

programme.title: E6 - Let's Learn to Be Healthy!
programme.desc: Let's learn how to be healthy with Baby John! He learns all about the bones that make up his body when he visits the doctor & his friend 'Mr. Skeleton'! Then, after tripping & falling while playing soccer, Baby John learns the tough task of tying his own shoelaces! The health lessons continue as Mom & Dad teach him how to properly sneeze into his arm to keep everyone around him from getting sick.

programme.title: E2 - The Biggest, Craziest Disasters!
programme.desc: Join Digley & Dazey as they face the biggest, craziest disasters! First, a big thunderstorm hits while the crew is working, & they have to rescue Scout after she gets trapped down a hole! Then, while working on a railway bridge, an earthquake causes it to almost fall apart, & the team must fix it before a train crosses! From escaping an avalanche they accidentally caused on a mountain to helping a baby lion that has escaped from the zoo, it's a day of big disasters!

programme.title: E2 - Causing Chaos All Over Town!
programme.desc: Arpo & Baby Daniel are causing chaos all over town! The adventure starts at the supermarket when Daniel runs off with a giant lollipop, leading to a wild chase with Arpo's rockets on the fritz. Then, a relaxing fishing picnic turns into a wilderness survival test when a thieving squirrel tries to steal their food! Plus, the family gets a mischievous new puppy that Arpo has to keep from making messes & a stroller goes on the loose, forcing Arpo to chase it through town!

programme.title: E1 - A Day of Food, Play & Learning!
programme.desc: Join the kids for a day of food, play & learning! First, Grandma Panda bakes some cupcakes while Mia & Bari role-play as bakers in their own pretend kitchen & play a game of pat-a-cake. Then, it's time for a teddy bear's picnic with a whole variety of different tasty treats! The learning continues as Daddy & Twinkle show Max how to say hello with a wave before going into town to wave hello to all their friends. It's a fun-filled, yummy day!

programme.title: E1 - So Many Fun Things to Discover!
programme.desc: There are so many fun things to discover with Mia, Max & their friends! First, they head to the park for some rolling fun as they play Jack & Jill, rolling down the muddy grass & whizzing down the slide! Then, Max gets his first sippy cup & is so excited to show it off that he starts an impromptu tea party with all his playmates. The day of discovery ends with a rainy day competition to see who can make the biggest puddle splash of all!

programme.title: E16 - Amandine Chaignot
programme.desc: Amandine Chaignot, a chef with a passion for French cuisine, combines her love of local produce with influences from her travels and her taste for world cuisine. On today's menu: partridge served with roasted pears, cinnamon and cloves.

programme.title: E7 - Textured Meals For Babies!
programme.desc: On the baby food shelves, purees are being dethroned. A close look at the range of so called textured meals sold in stores. Also covered: naan bread, from tradition to industrialization; miso paste; the origins of the pretzel.

programme.title: E7 - Textured Meals For Babies!
programme.desc: On the baby food shelves, purees are being dethroned. A close look at the range of so called textured meals sold in stores. Also covered: naan bread, from tradition to industrialization; miso paste; the origins of the pretzel.

programme.title: E1 - Of Ice And Blocks/A World Of Silhouettes
programme.desc: The Aletsch Glacier provides the background for the programme. We try climbing frozen blocks, and meet a paper-cutter in the Pays-d'Enhaut whose work has won awards in Japan and been exhibited in China.

programme.title: E108
programme.desc: An interactive programme that's as fun as it is informative and reactive to the meteorological events of the moment. Reports from the regions and special subjects in the studio offer an easy way to better understand the impact weather has on health, nature, history and everyday life.

programme.title: E1 - Of Ice And Blocks/A World Of Silhouettes
programme.desc: The Aletsch Glacier provides the background for the programme. We try climbing frozen blocks, and meet a paper-cutter in the Pays-d'Enhaut whose work has won awards in Japan and been exhibited in China.

programme.title: E20 - Sarah Lavoine/Camellia/Petit Bateau/Tartan
programme.desc: After interior design, beautiful shops and furnishings, Sarah Lavoine has launched a clothing collection. All there is to know about the camellia, the emblematic flower of Chanel. For 130 years, the Petit Bateau brand has established itself with force and tenderness. Dare the square, or how to wear tartan.

programme.title: E108
programme.desc: An interactive programme that's as fun as it is informative and reactive to the meteorological events of the moment. Reports from the regions and special subjects in the studio offer an easy way to better understand the impact weather has on health, nature, history and everyday life.

programme.title: E1 - Of Ice And Blocks/A World Of Silhouettes
programme.desc: The Aletsch Glacier provides the background for the programme. We try climbing frozen blocks, and meet a paper-cutter in the Pays-d'Enhaut whose work has won awards in Japan and been exhibited in China.

programme.title: E14 - The Women Salt Workers
programme.desc: In Guerande's salt marshes ''paludiere'', the feminine form of ''paludier'' or salt worker, long-referred to the salt worker's wife, with no professional status. Today 15% of ''paludieres'' run their own salt business. Dominique, Veronique and Morgane recount how their place in a still predominantly masculine profession, changed over the years.

programme.title: E8 - School Lunches In France
programme.desc: In France, not all primary school canteens offer the same quality. But thanks to citizen and political initiatives, food offerings are evolving. Example in Romainville... Also covered: the French anti food waste law; Q&A; when Japan inspires French pastry.

programme.title: E8 - School Lunches In France
programme.desc: In France, not all primary school canteens offer the same quality. But thanks to citizen and political initiatives, food offerings are evolving. Example in Romainville... Also covered: the French anti food waste law; Q&A; when Japan inspires French pastry.

programme.title: E20 - Sarah Lavoine/Camellia/Petit Bateau/Tartan
programme.desc: After interior design, beautiful shops and furnishings, Sarah Lavoine has launched a clothing collection. All there is to know about the camellia, the emblematic flower of Chanel. For 130 years, the Petit Bateau brand has established itself with force and tenderness. Dare the square, or how to wear tartan.

programme.title: E14 - The Women Salt Workers
programme.desc: In Guerande's salt marshes ''paludiere'', the feminine form of ''paludier'' or salt worker, long-referred to the salt worker's wife, with no professional status. Today 15% of ''paludieres'' run their own salt business. Dominique, Veronique and Morgane recount how their place in a still predominantly masculine profession, changed over the years.

programme.title: E8 - Clemence D'ennery/Juliette Clovis/Rabanne/Marion Mezenge
programme.desc: Clemence d'Ennery unveils her collection of Asian works in a Paris hotel. Using porcelain petals, Juliette Clovis opens up a luminous, dreamlike world. At Rabanne, we push the boundaries of women's dressing with bold materials. Immerse yourself in the studio of artist Marion Mezenge.

programme.title: Neal 'n' Nikki
programme.desc: Neal spends a month on vacation before getting married. He falls in love with Nikki. On his return, he finds that he is engaged to her cousin. Release Year: 2005 Director: Arjun Sablok

programme.title: E31
programme.desc: 潘岩(郭麒麟 飾)在機緣巧合下進入榮柯律所實習，認識了高冷女神左娜(金晨 飾)、學霸舒一南(晏紫東 飾)等一批年輕人。他們在資深前輩易帆(朱珠飾)、杜飛宇(張子賢飾)等人的帶領下，經歷了職場的波折坎坷和困難考驗，一起並肩作戰，互相學習成長，憑著熱情拼搏的職場精神，在情與法、義與利的境地裡突圍，更堅定了對法律的崇高信仰，同時也對自身的突破與飛躍有了新的認識與感悟，於職場和生活的路上守望初心，在平凡中創造不凡的「奮逗」故事。

E2 - Kruger's Pafuri
programme.desc: In the northern reaches of the Kruger National Park, life depends on one thing – water. In a land burdened by heat and drought a single ribbon cuts its reliable course through the wilderness. It’s a lifeline to all creatures, great and small.

programme.title: E3 - Augrabies Falls
programme.desc: Augrabies is where the mighty Orange River plunges over the awesome 56 meter Augrabies waterfall. Derived from a word “oukurubes” which means “place of thunder” in the indigenous language of the Nama-Khoi this land is the heart of a harsh and sun-beaten world with flashes of brilliant color and a thunderous roar.

programme.title: E3 - One Very Lost Sea Turtle
programme.desc: Follow the team in healing and releasing a grumpy sea turtle, and then meet a sea lion with an unusual injury that must be taken by crane to the rescue centre. Find out how the vet aids an aging fruit bat and a community rescues a one-eyed seal pup.

programme.title: E3 - Bay of Fundy
programme.desc: Step into the Bay of Fundy’s surging waters. Learn how this east coast ecosystem sustains an abundance of creatures, including hundreds of thousands of seabirds, the world’s fastest predator, and a complex web of invertebrates.

programme.title: E3 - Bay of Fundy
programme.desc: Step into the Bay of Fundy’s surging waters. Learn how this east coast ecosystem sustains an abundance of creatures, including hundreds of thousands of seabirds, the world’s fastest predator, and a complex web of invertebrates.

programme.title: E2 - Kruger's Pafuri
programme.desc: In the northern reaches of the Kruger National Park, life depends on one thing – water. In a land burdened by heat and drought a single ribbon cuts its reliable course through the wilderness. It’s a lifeline to all creatures, great and small.

programme.title: E3 - Augrabies Falls
programme.desc: Augrabies is where the mighty Orange River plunges over the awesome 56 meter Augrabies waterfall. Derived from a word “oukurubes” which means “place of thunder” in the indigenous language of the Nama-Khoi this land is the heart of a harsh and sun-beaten world with flashes of brilliant color and a thunderous roar.
